description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden ammunition crate with visible wood grain and reinforced edges. The top of the box is open, revealing a densely packed layer of metallic rifle cartridges inside. The front and back faces are stenciled with bold black lettering reading 'WARNING .30 CAL. M1 AMMO', while the sides display a prominent U.S. Army star insignia and the words 'U.S. ARMY'. The wood appears weathered and utilitarian, suitable for military or rugged outdoor use. The box lacks visible handles, locks, or a lid, and is designed for bulk storage and transport of ammunition. Its robust construction suggests it can support significant weight and withstand rough handling.
description: A large, open-topped wooden ammunition crate filled with rifle cartridges, featuring military stenciling and insignia on its sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'WARNING .30 CAL. M1 AMMO' stenciled in black on the wood, with the open top revealing ammunition inside.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a large black U.S. Army star insignia and 'U.S. ARMY' text, with the open top and visible cartridges.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, with 'WARNING .30 CAL. M1 AMMO' stenciling and open top full of cartridges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same U.S. Army star insignia and 'U.S. ARMY' text, open top showing ammunition.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, warehouse, military depot, stackable
